title: NuScale Petrochemical Partnership Highlights New Path For Industrial Process Heat
summary: NuScale Power and Ebara Elliott Energy announce a collaboration to integrate NuScale's small modular reactors into petrochemical plants. The partnership focuses on using nuclear process heat for industrial-scale petrochemical operations rather than only electricity generation. Compressor equipment tied to the project is targeted for completion by 2027, with progress updates planned at a major industry conference.
